description: M-4 pin: purging an observation that has a vectors row MUST append a purge_log tombstone with item_kind='vector', exactly as it does for the deleted observation and its cascade-orphaned facts (§1.7: one purge_log row per deleted item; schema enumerates 'observation'|'fact'|'vector'). One OCR observation derives session.occurred + session.used_app (both sole-provenance, non-user => cascade-purged) and carries one injected observation vector. cv-008 could not see this defect because its content is under embed_min_chars so no vector row exists; here an injected vector (bypasses embed_min_chars AND chunker, format note 6) forces the vector delete path. Before the fix the adapter deleted the vectors row silently with no tombstone (purge_log kinds were [observation,fact,fact]), losing the deletion for the P6 replication-tombstone ordering this table exists for. Expected purge_log kinds: observation, fact, fact, vector. After purge: 0 observations, 0 facts (all cascade-purged; user facts would survive but there are none).
